name: Listicle
description: Numbered list format (3 reasons, 5 tips, etc.). Each item gets its own scene with footage. Fast-paced, scannable, great for retention. Works well on TikTok/Reels.

scenes.description: Bold numbered claim that promises value
scenes.footage_hint: Eye-catching visual or text overlay with number

scenes.description: First list item with visual proof
Second list item with visual proof
Third list item -- often the strongest point
scenes.footage_hint: Footage demonstrating point #3 (save best for last)
Product beauty shot or satisfying compilation

scenes.description: CTA with urgency or curiosity hook
